provenance.rationale: Initial round of the offline wide-MMR optuna study (rag-wide-mmr-offline-v1). Search space is the narrow grid the wide-MMR-titlecap diagnostic sweep at _archive/confirm-runs/wide-mmr-titlecap-20260429-1353 surfaced as worth refining: (a) candidate_k=[100,200] because hit@5 was identical between 50/100/200 in the diagnostic — keep 100/200 to confirm, drop 50; (b) use_mmr fixed to true because every MMR cell in the diagnostic graded promising_quality vs the no-MMR baseline; (c) mmr_lambda in [0.55, 0.75] continuous because 0.60/0.65 tied in the diagnostic and 0.70 lost MRR (search the narrow window); (d) rerank_in capped at 32 because rerank_in=40 hurt MRR and added 24% latency in the diagnostic; (e) title_cap_rerank_input / title_cap_final 1/2/3 because cap=1 == cap=2 in the diagnostic — round_01 explicitly probes if cap=3 (looser) is identical too or whether tightening to cap=1 helps under different lambda/rerank_in combos that the diagnostic 9-cell grid didn't isolate; (f) final_top_k 5/8/10 because dup@10 dropped 0.500→0.200 going 5→8 in the diagnostic but the metric we maximize (mean_hit_at_5) is independent of top_k>=5 — letting Optuna pick reveals whether top_k=8/10 trade dup for any MRR-via-top-rank gain. Subsample to first 50 silver_200 rows so each trial finishes in ~60s on RTX 5080. n_trials=12 leaves headroom for the next round to narrow without saturating the offline cache. n_startup_trials=4 because the search space is 8-dim mixed and TPE needs at least one full exploration pass over the categoricals.

notes: Conditional axes: title_cap_rerank_input=null and title_cap_final=null are NOT in the search space — wide-mmr diagnostic showed the no-cap baseline is dominated by every cap-2/cap-1 cell on quality, so this round only optimizes among 1/2/3 caps. mmr_k is sampled but only matters when use_mmr=true (which is fixed); the underlying adapter ignores mmr_k when MMR is off. final_top_k>=5 by construction so mean_hit_at_5 is computable across every trial. Primary metric mean_hit_at_5 chosen over mrr because it directly answers 'did wide pool + MMR move the production-relevant top-5 selection' which is the wide-mmr sweep's central question.
